title: cornukaempferia chayanii
intro: Cornukaempferia chayanii, also known as Thai ginger, is a type of plant that belongs to the Zingiberaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Thai medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cornukaempferia chayanii include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
